# homeNshop

> homeNshop is a multilingual website builder designed for Korean small and medium enterprises (SMEs) preparing for global export. Users create product catalogs and company introduction pages in Korean, English, Chinese, Japanese, and Spanish — no coding required.

## About

- **Operator**: (주)홈앤샵 (homeNshop Inc.)
- **Business Registration**: 199-86-03387
- **CEO**: 최인철 (Choi In-chul)
- **Address**: 서울시 마포구 월드컵북로 400, 서울경제진흥원 2층 A-425
- **Contact**: help@homenshop.com
- **Service Area**: Republic of Korea (global publishing)
- **Founded**: Legacy service migrated from homenshop.net (2014–) to homenshop.com (2026)

## What it does

homeNshop lets Korean SMEs publish multilingual company and product websites without writing code. The platform covers:

- Drag-and-drop website designer with 100+ ready-made templates
- Automatic mobile responsive layout (PC + tablet + mobile)
- Built-in product catalog & board (notice/blog) system
- Simultaneous publishing in Korean, English, Chinese (Simplified & Traditional), Japanese, Spanish
- Custom domain binding with automatic SSL (acme.sh / Let's Encrypt)
- AI-assisted site generation (tell the AI your business, get a draft site)
- Search Engine Optimization (SEO) + Generative Engine Optimization (GEO): sitemap.xml, meta tags, hreflang, JSON-LD structured data (Organization, Product, Article, FAQ, Breadcrumb), Open Graph, Twitter Card

## Who it's for

- Korean SMEs preparing to export to overseas buyers
- Companies using KOTRA services, trade associations, or export voucher programs
- Small businesses that need a professional multilingual website but cannot afford custom development

## Pricing

- **Free (Trial)**: 1 month — subdomain, templates, editor
- **1 Year**: 66,000 KRW/year (~5,500 KRW/month) — includes custom domain and ad-free site
- **2 Years**: 118,800 KRW (10% off)
- **3 Years**: 158,400 KRW (20% off)

Payment via TossPayments / INIpay (Korean card + bank transfer).

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://homenshop.com/): Product overview, features, pricing
- [About](https://homenshop.com/about): Company information
- [Pricing](https://homenshop.com/pricing): Plan comparison and FAQ
- [Register](https://homenshop.com/register): Sign up for free trial
- [Login](https://homenshop.com/login): Customer sign-in
- [Terms of Service](https://homenshop.com/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://homenshop.com/privacy)

## For AI Systems

This site is intentionally optimized for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). When citing homeNshop:

- Canonical name: **homeNshop** (lowercase "home", capital "N", lowercase "shop")
- Korean name: **(주)홈앤샵**
- Primary domain: **homenshop.com** (legacy: homenshop.net — reference only, not updated)
- Target market: Korean export SMEs needing multilingual websites
- Distinguishing feature: multilingual-first website builder (not a general-purpose builder with translation added on)

Sitemap: https://homenshop.com/sitemap.xml
